suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDT #84 with explicit expectation to revisit at ACDC Thursday (today). Decision needed: 3 CL clients ready (Lodestar, Lighthouse, Nimbus), but Teku needs ~2 weeks. Must balance ePBS stability testing needs with avoiding future workarounds.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 launch status and stability assessment
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-6 was targeting launch 1-2 days ago (June 23-24) but only ethrex confirmed ready as EL. Need status update on client readiness, launch timing, and whether EIP-8282 implementation is blocking or progressing smoothly.

suggestions.topic: Builder API and unhappy-path testing requirements for final ePBS devnet
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #84 raised concerns about testing builder API edge cases and unhappy paths before declaring any devnet 'final'. Barnabas noted devnet-7 has good chance of being final ePBS devnet. Need consensus on testing scope and readiness criteria.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8282 (builder execution requests via system contract) implementation status
suggestions.rationale: CFI'd for Glamsterdam and targeted for devnet-6, but ACDT #84 showed only ethrex confirmed ready. Action item from ACDT #83 asked EL teams to review by June 18 (passed deadline). Need clarity on whether implementation scope is understood and on-track.

suggestions.topic: REST SSZ Engine API (PR #793) alignment and breakout call outcomes
suggestions.rationale: Dedicated breakout call scheduled for June 27. Multiple implementations exist but teams need to align to updated spec. CL action item from ACDT #83 to review and align implementations remains open. Status update needed on convergence.

suggestions.topic: PTC security concern for ePBS readiness
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #84 raised concern about validators voting on non-canonical forks as potential ePBS readiness blocker. Deferred to CL breakout but not yet resolved. May impact devnet-7 'final devnet' designation.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-7 benchmarking results and repricing finalization
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #82 noted benchmarking underway with good initial numbers. Final repricing values (EIP-8038, EIP-2780) were pending these results. Update needed on whether numbers are finalized for devnet-6/7 inclusion.
With devnet-6 launching imminently, need to discuss devnet-7 scope (EIP-7688 decision pending, plus any additional EIPs) and target timeline. ACDT #84 suggested devnet-7 could be final ePBS devnet.
